bird.name: Blue-wattled bulbul
bird.summary: The blue-wattled bulbul (Microtarsus nieuwenhuisii) is a species of songbird in the bulbul family of passerine birds. The specific epithet…

relations.subject: Blue-wattled bulbul
relations.evidence: It may be threatened by habitat loss but is only known from two specimens collected in 1900 and 1937, and few observations
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。
